tweets.text:
#LLM is not #AI

LLM is a probabilistic language model, not "real intelligence".

・Prediction
It is generated by learning the probability of occurrence of the word sequence.

・Not understanding
I don't "understand" the meaning and intention internally.
 https://t.co/LJ0kUO3oxk

tweets.text:
Modern bug bounty tip 👇

Testing an AI assistant?

• Generate a file payload directly in https://t.co/otrB4NwiT1 with your listener already embedded.
• Then ask the AI to summarize, analyze, or process the document.
• If Pingback receives a callback, you've confirmed the AI https://t.co/HBfjPA4CDG
